title: Length of Last Word
description:
Given a string `s` consisting of words separated by spaces, return the length
of the **last word**. A word is a maximal substring of non-space characters.
constraints: s consists of English letters and spaces.
There is at least one word in s.

examples.input: s = "   fly me   to   the moon  "

solutions.summary: Skip trailing spaces, then count letters until the next space.

steps.title: Skip trailing spaces
steps.explanation: Start an index at the end and move left past any spaces.

steps.title: Count the final word
steps.explanation: Keep moving left while characters are non-space, counting each one.
